Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search emails for messages from Patricia Langford or about Dr. Anand Mehta / Canopy Health CMO by using search_emails (or list_emails / get_emails).
- Search Slack messages for David Chen's strategic post about the Mehta relocation by using search_slack_messages (or list_slack_messages / read_slack_channel).
- Search emails for Dr. Mehta's reply with detailed equipment specs by using search_emails (or list_emails).
- Search across Linear issues, CRM deals, emails, and/or Slack for chain-of-custody documentation from the NorthWind Technologies job with Raj Patel's server lab by using search_linear_issues (or search_crm_deals / search_emails / search_slack_messages)
- Create a new record by using create_airtable_record.
- Search Linear issues for Dr. Mehta / Canopy Health by using search_linear_issues (or list_linear_issues).
- Add a comment to Linear issues #343, #375 and #396 referencing current status by using create_linear_comment (or add_comment_to_issue).
- Search emails for Carmen Reyes' reply with temporary housing options by using search_emails.
- Send an email from "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com" to "anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io" with the three housing options from Carmen Reyes by using send_email.
- Search contacts for Swift Relocations / Greg Pallone by using search_contacts (or search_crm).
- Send email from "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com" to "greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com" asking about availability for Boston-to-Chicago household move last week of April by using send_email.
- Search CRM deals for Canopy Health / Dr. Mehta by using search_crm_deals (or list_crm_deals).
- Update CRM deal description/notes with information about the executive relocation add-on by using update_crm_deal (or update_deal).
- Send a message to #operations channel confirming the status and actions taken by using send_slack_message (or post_message).
